title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FurnitureMart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FurnitureMart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the FurnitureMart family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Bengaluru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About FurnitureMart:
FurnitureMart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FurnitureMart!
